periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 80, with temperatures falling to around 77 in the afternoon. East wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 66, with temperatures rising to around 68 overnight. East wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

periods.name: Saturday

periods.name: Saturday Night

periods.name: Sunday
